title: BSNC to Receive Conveyance at Aġnatquksraq (Old Woman Mountain)
summary: BSNC is pleased to announce that 90 acres at Aġnatquksraq (Old Woman Mountain) will soon be conveyed to the corporation in partial fulfillment of the acreage available pursuant to Section 14(h)(1) of the Alaska Native Claims Settlement Act (ANCSA). title: Flood advisory in effect for Coastal Yukon River
summary: Sage Smiley , Evan Erickson KYUK Public Media As high water recedes, communities on the coast and along the lower Kuskokwim River are taking stock of flood damage and erosion after two windy storms in quick succession filled rivers and streams and flooded low-lying areas, according to a story by KYUK Public Media . Some residents in the predominantly Yup’ik region reported that the flooding was worse than Typhoon Merbok and rivals this year’s historic breakup floods on the Ku...
